title: Simply Soft White Cotton Pads, 60 Count (8 cm x 6cm) - Chic Oval Design, Ideal for Makeup Removal & Skin Cleansing
features: CHIC OVAL DESIGN: Our oval pads not only provide functionality but also add a touch of elegance to your beauty shelf. The chic design elevates the appearance of your skincare products, making them a stylish addition to your daily routine.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted with 100% pure cotton, these pads are designed to provide a delicate touch to your skin. This makes them suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

CONVENIENT & TRAVEL-FRIENDLY: Each pack contains 60 counts of 8 cm x 6 cm oval pads, which makes them perfect to pack for travel. Take them with you on vacation, or keep a pack in your gym bag for quick and easy post-workout cleansing.

VERSATILE & MULTI-USE: These stylish oval pads are perfect for a variety of beauty applications. From applying toners and lotions to fixing makeup mishaps, they offer versatility in your beauty routine.

ELEVATE YOUR BEAUTY ROUTINE: The chic oval design of our pads adds a touch of sophistication to your skincare routine, making it a luxurious experience every time. Say goodbye to boring and plain-looking cotton pads and upgrade to our simply soft white oval pads.
description: Product Description These pads are ideal for a wide range of uses, including skin cleansing and removing make up. Directions Makeup removal & skin cleansing Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
